criteria.name: Accounting and finance fundamentals
criteria.description: Evidence of coursework or applied understanding of accounting, finance, or economics.
negative_signals: Finance terms with no coursework or project context

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Excel and financial modeling
criteria.description: Evidence of using Excel or spreadsheets for analysis, modeling, or reporting.
positive_signals: Specific model or analysis purpose is clear

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Valuation or market research
criteria.description: Evidence of valuation, comparable analysis, industry research, or market monitoring.
positive_signals: Method and business question are clear
negative_signals: Mentions valuation without assumptions or scope

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Data analysis
criteria.description: Evidence of analyzing financial, market, operational, or tabular data.
positive_signals: Analysis input and output are described

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Investment or corporate finance project evidence
criteria.description: Evidence of a finance-related class, club, internship, or self-directed project.
negative_signals: Claims investment skill without project evidence

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Commercial judgment
criteria.description: Evidence of interpreting business drivers, risks, or tradeoffs.
negative_signals: Only reports figures with no interpretation

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Report writing
criteria.description: Evidence of writing concise reports, summaries, memos, or presentations.

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Attention to detail
criteria.description: Evidence of careful data handling, review, reconciliation, or error checking.
evidence_required: Review, reconciliation, or quality check task
positive_signals: Describes a specific accuracy or review responsibility

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Measurable impact, ATS readability, and truthfulness
criteria.description: Uses finance keywords and metrics only when evidence is user-provided.
negative_signals: Unsupported dollar amounts, returns, or efficiency claims
